title: phacelia cicutaria var. cicutaria
intro: Phacelia cicutaria var. cicutaria, also known as Lophosia or cut-leaved phacelia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phacelia cicutaria var. cicutaria include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
